leaflet_html_snippet:
<!-- Add to your HTML <head> -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"/>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet.markercluster@1.5.3/dist/MarkerCluster.css"/>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet.markercluster@1.5.3/dist/leaflet.markercluster.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet.heat@0.2.0/dist/leaflet-heat.js"></script>

<!-- JavaScript -->
<script>
// Initialize map
const map = L.map('map').setView([20.5937, 78.9629], 5);
L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png').addTo(map);

// Load GeoJSON and create heatmap
fetch('hunger_heatmap.geojson')
  .then(r => r.json())
  .then(data => {
    const heatData = data.features.map(f => [
      f.geometry.coordinates[1],
      f.geometry.coordinates[0],
      f.properties.Food_Insecurity_Score
    ]);
    L.heatLayer(heatData, {radius: 25, blur: 15, maxZoom: 12}).addTo(map);
  });

// Load hotspots as clustered markers
fetch('hotspots.geojson')
  .then(r => r.json())
  .then(data => {
    const markers = L.markerClusterGroup();
    L.geoJSON(data, {
      onEachFeature: (feature, layer) => {
        layer.bindPopup(feature.properties.popup_label);
      }
    }).addTo(markers);
    map.addLayer(markers);
  });
</script>
